record.title: Emmet & Anna Utt, 1973-10-19, Interview #4 - MP3 Recording
record.subject: Latah County -- Idaho
record.occupation: Sawyer in Potlatch mill; farmer;Teacher; farm wife

point.title: Propaganda against the Wobblies; camp conditions
point.synopsis: Propaganda against the Wobblies. How the Princeton community felt about them. Effects it had on the farming country. Conditions of the camps. Wobblies getting blamed for things that they didn't do.

point.title: Stories from when he was a kid
point.synopsis: Stories from when he was a kid. Walking to Potlatch to get a haircut. Jungle up through Elk Creek. Not wanting to get caught out in the dark. Nowadays kids have motorcycles to go to Moscow.

point.title: First car in town; trading horses and cows for a car; people getting killed working on the railroad
point.synopsis: First car in town. The fastest Ford in America. Trading horses or cows for down payments on a car. Watching them build a road on Potlatch Hill. People would get killed working on the railroad.

point.title: Stories about going sledding and ice skating as a kid; Competing with a friend
point.synopsis: Going sledding under a barbed wire fence. Stories about going ice skating on the river. Competing with one of his friend.

point.title: Outrunning the train on his motorcycle; car accident
point.synopsis: Outrunning the train on his motorcycle. Stories made up about him riding his motorcycle. Car accident. Getting into an argument in Harvard.

point.title: Rivalry between Harvard and Princeton kids; playing hooky
point.synopsis: Rivalry between Harvard and Princeton kids. Would play each other in ball games. Playing hooky and going up to Harvard.

point.title: Going to school; his parents' place
point.synopsis: Religion in school. People couldn't afford college. Parents bought their place in three different pieces.

point.title: Homesteaders; working in the mill; working on the farm; skills he learned
point.synopsis: Homesteaders who stood out. Working in the mill. Quitting to work on the farm. Skills he learned from working at the sawmill.

point.title: Management at the sawmill; a lazy logger
point.synopsis: Management at the sawmill. Who got blamed if something went wrong. A lazy logger

point.title: Logging techniques; operation of a sawmill
point.synopsis: Explaining logging techniques. Operation of a sawmill.

point.title: Others who worked in the mill; bosses causing trouble
point.synopsis: Others who worked in the sawmill. Bosses caused trouble, not the management.

point.title: Issues with his boss
point.synopsis: Issues with his boss. Got his boss fired.

record.description: A boy's adventures on horse, bicycle, sled and skates. Competition with a friend. Motorcycling. Coming of cars. Working in Potlatch sawmill: sources of conflict in the crew; art of running saws. 10-19-73 1.9 hr 50p
record.rights: Digital format copyright: University of Idaho Library. Original Copyright: Latah County Historical Society
